hypotheses.name: STRING continuous AUROC + TRRUST-exclusive proximity (overlap-corrected)
hypotheses.method: Pairwise Spearman(STRING_score, L2_distance) over all 3092 STRING pairs at each of 12 layers. AUROC for binary STRING membership vs distance. Overlap-corrected TRRUST: separate 141 TRRUST-exclusive pairs (not in STRING) from 185 STRING-overlapping TRRUST pairs. Mann-Whitney test TRRUST-exclusive vs 9276 non-STRING named-gene pairs per layer.
hypotheses.result_value: STRING rho=-0.093 (all 12 layers p<1e-5), AUROC=0.614; TRRUST-excl effect=-0.030, AUROC=0.573 (all 12 layers p<0.007)
hypotheses.next_action: Test STRING confidence in deciles (10 points vs 5) for nonlinear threshold; extend TRRUST to directional test (activation vs repression)
hypotheses.notes: Fixes iter_0021 H01 (5-quintile underpowered test) with continuous Spearman over 3092 pairs. STRING confidence predicts distance (rho=-0.093). TRRUST-exclusive pairs (NOT in STRING, N=141) still show proximity (effect=-0.030), confirming regulatory program geometry independent of PPI overlap.

hypotheses.name: Cell-type marker gene cluster separation
hypotheses.method: Map 209 named genes to 3 lung cell-type categories (T cell: 7 genes, B cell: 4 genes, fibroblast: 3 genes) using canonical literature markers. Compute within-cell-type (N=30 pairs) vs cross-cell-type (N=61 pairs) pairwise L2 distances on unit sphere at each of 12 layers. Mann-Whitney test within < cross. Permutation null: 500 shuffles of cell-type assignments preserving group sizes.
hypotheses.result_value: AUROC=0.853 mean (range [0.811,0.890]), effect=-0.222, z=-4.55, 12/12 layers significant (p<1e-6), 12/12 permutation sig
hypotheses.next_action: Expand to more cell types (macrophage, NK, endothelial); test Geneformer replication; visualize with UMAP; check if effect holds for non-marker named genes (contamination control)
hypotheses.notes: Strongest geometric effect found in the project. scGPT embedding geometry clusters cell-type marker genes within cell types far more tightly than across cell types. AUROC=0.853 >> STRING proximity AUROC=0.614. Effect deepens with layer depth (L0: -0.164 -> L11: -0.276), consistent with progressive cell-type specialization. All 12 layers significant by both MW and permutation test.

hypotheses.name: Per-layer bootstrap CIs for co-polarity enrichment + persistence entropy proxy
hypotheses.method: (a) Proxy persistence entropy via pairwise distance histogram entropy per layer. (b) Per-layer bootstrap CIs (N=500) for STRING co-polarity enrichment ratio across SV2+SV3+SV4 (count=3). Extends iter_0021 H03 from layer-8-only CI to all 12 layers.
hypotheses.primary_metric: Co-polarity enrichment ratio CI lower bound > 1.0
hypotheses.result_value: All 12/12 layers: CI lower bound > 1.0 (mean ratio=1.542, range=[1.340,1.689]). Entropy proxy: rho=-0.434 vs layer, p=0.16 (not significant).
hypotheses.next_action: Run full ripser per-layer to get actual H1 lifetime arrays for true persistence entropy; co-polarity result is now publish-ready (all 12 layers with CIs)
hypotheses.notes: Co-polarity bootstrap CI extended to all 12 layers - all exclude null (CI_low > 1.0 everywhere). Mean ratio=1.542, no significant layer trend (rho=0.084). This confirms the co-polarity enrichment is a stable, layer-invariant geometric property. Proxy entropy insufficient for persistence entropy measurement - needs proper ripser lifetime arrays.
